sentences.arabic: يَلْعَبُ الأَطْفَالُ فِي الشَّارِعِ بَعْدَ المَدْرَسَةِ.
sentences.translation: Djeca se igraju na ulici nakon škole.
sentences.translationEn: Children play in the street after school.
Neighbors watch the children from the windows.

sentences.arabic: اللَّعِبُ فِي الهَوَاءِ الطَّلْقِ مُفِيدٌ لِلصِّحَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Igranje na otvorenom je korisno za zdravlje.
sentences.translationEn: Playing in the open air is good for health.
